name: tsukuruba inc.
summary: tsukuruba inc. offers technology-powered property-related services. It provides cowcamo, a real estate online brokerage platform for used and renovated properties. The company also offers Shared Workplace that provides solutions related to workplace, including Facility Design for office search, design, and relocation consulting services; HEYSHA, which offers office spaces for startups; and co-ba, a subscription-based co-working offices. The company also offers Creative Team, a community of engineers, designers, and architects comprising tsukuruba studios, a place of experiment that crosses modern design. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
